title: The Transistor Switch
script_summary: Exploring the pivotal role of transistors in modern technology.

segments.voiceover: A tiny device that changed everything: the transistor.
Transistors amplify and switch electrical signals, forming the backbone of digital computing.
Before transistors, computers were massive and unreliable. Now? They're in your pocket!
Invented in 1947, it marked the dawn of the electronics age, sparking a revolution.
From smartphones to supercomputers, the transistor is everywhere. Imagine a world without it!
Curious about more tech marvels? Hit follow and explore with us!
